endpoints.name: Get templates
endpoints.description: Returns a list of templates available for the authenticated workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create template
endpoints.description: Creates a new template. If template configuration is not specified in the request body then an empty template is created. Template is placed to the workspace specified in authentication params. Template configuration must be sent in the request body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Generate document (multiple templates)
endpoints.description: Allows to merge multiples template with data and returns base64 encoded document or public URL to a document. NB! When the public URL option is used, the document is stored for 30 days and automatically deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get template
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Update template
endpoints.description: Updates template configuration. The template configuration for pages and layout must be complete as the entire configuration is replaced and not merged.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete template
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Copy template
endpoints.description: Creates a copy of a template to the workspace specified in authentication parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Open editor
endpoints.description: Returns an unique URL which you can use to redirect your user to the editor from your application or use the generated URL as iframe source to show the editor within your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Generate document
endpoints.description: Merges template with data and returns base64 encoded document or a public URL to a document. You can send json encoded data in request body or a public URL to your json file as the data parameter. NB! When the public URL option is used, the document is stored for 30 days and automatically deleted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Delete workspace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PDFGENERATORAPI_API_KEY}} with your PDFGENERATORAPI API KEY.
